# basel-ai-overlay-mcp
# Basel III + SR 11-7 + ECB TRIM AI/ML model risk management for banks deploying AI in credit, capital, treasury, AML/CFT.

## Install
```bash
pip install basel-ai-overlay-mcp
```

## Auth & Rate Limits
- Free tier: 10 calls/day. No API key required.
- Pro tier (£79/mo): unlimited + signed attestations.
- Enterprise (£1,499/mo): white-label + on-premise.

## Tools (5)

### `model_risk_tier(query, api_key)`
Tier AI/ML models per SR 11-7 materiality framework

### `validation_requirements(query, api_key)`
Independent model validation requirements + frequency

### `ecb_trim_check(query, api_key)`
ECB TRIM internal model investigation areas

### `ifrs9_ecl_audit(query, api_key)`
IFRS 9 Expected Credit Loss AI model governance

### `frtb_market_risk(query, api_key)`
FRTB internal model approach AI/ML usage check

## Pairs with
- `meok-attestation-api` — HMAC signing for compliance certs
- `meok-attestation-verify` — public verification

## Maintainer
MEOK AI Labs · hello@meok.ai · https://meok.ai · MIT
